Bash(sqlite3 data/agentscraper.db "SELECT id, name, agent_mode, llm_provider, model, discovery_llm_provider, discovery_llm_model, max_iterations, crawler_enabled, crawler_url_pattern, crawler_max_depth, bulk_concurrency, bulk_rate_limit_per_sec, extraction_template, seed_queries FROM tasks WHERE name LIKE '%BookCrawler%' OR name LIKE '%MixWithKey%';")

PowerShell(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('data/agentscraper.db'\); c.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; rows=c.execute\(\\"SELECT id, name, agent_mode, llm_provider, model, discovery_llm_provider, discovery_llm_model, max_iterations, crawler_enabled, crawler_url_pattern, crawler_max_depth, bulk_concurrency, bulk_rate_limit_per_sec, extraction_template, seed_queries, allowed_domains, llm_api_key, discovery_llm_api_key, llm_base_url FROM tasks WHERE name LIKE '%Book%' OR name LIKE '%Mix%'\\"\).fetchall\(\); import json; [print\(json.dumps\(dict\(r\), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\) for r in rows]")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "http://localhost:11434/api/tags" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \("ollama_up: " + $r.StatusCode\); $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.models | Select-Object name | Out-String } catch { Write-Output \("ollama_down: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
PowerShell($ollama = Get-Command ollama -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ollama\) { Write-Output \("found: " + $ollama.Source\) } else { Write-Output "ollama not on PATH" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\Ferdinando\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama.exe" -ArgumentList "serve" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "http://localhost:11434/api/tags" -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output \("ollama_up: " + $r.StatusCode\); \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).models | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.name } } catch { Write-Output \("ollama_down: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not $conns\) { Write-Output "Nessun processo in ascolto sulla porta 8001." } else { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Killing PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } } })
